The '''''Gray Pilgrim''''' was the mobile [[Jedi academy]] upon which the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Maris Brood]] was taught the ways of the Jedi by her [[Jedi Master/Legends|master]]. Brood was aboard this ship with her master in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the issuance of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].<ref name="TFUSite" />

==History==
Rather than receiving formal [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Maris Brood was tutored by a [[Gender/Legends|male]] Jedi warrior aboard the ''Gray Pilgrim''. When [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Brood and her master were in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and thus not immediately affected by the initial purge. However, her master did feel the ripples in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] caused by the sudden [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of so many Jedi. After meeting only silence with every transmission he sent from the ''Pilgrim'' to the Jedi Temple, Brood's master took his [[Jedi starfighter|personal]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in search of answers. He never returned, but his last message to the ''Pilgrim'' revealed that the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] had been all but destroyed by a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] named [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Seeking revenge, Maris set off, presumably in the ''Pilgrim'', in search of Vader. On her way, she encountered [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], who convinced the angry Padawan to disappear into hiding on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]].<ref name="TFUSite" />
